analysis: U17 per-unit SG pellet-landing consolidation (ANALYSIS ONLY, no engine change)
basisNote: All units placed on the LOW/scope-lock ATK term (the term the engine uses) via each unit's PRIMARY M. ratio-to-table = measuredM/preRegM_H0 and is term-independent in its per-unit SPREAD. Absolute landing = ratio x classTable and is LOW-term; drop ~1.6% if the U18 term fix lands. isabel/guilty/brid pinned their own in-fight term (term-clean); noir/dorothy reconciled vs sim staticAtk term.

noir.measuredBasis: sim-reconciled, running-counter per-mag delta (overlap-immune), LOW term

isabel.measuredBasis: own term 117887 near-validated; PRIMARY M on LOW term (true term +2.3% higher, U18)
isabel.primaryDeficitCause: rider under-model (~+2.4M, +4.7%) + term +2.3%; landing is <1 so applying it WORSENS

guilty.measuredBasis: popup-verified term (+1.65%); PRIMARY M buff-corrected nominal, LOW term
guilty.shape: flat ~0.91 factor across the table; far is her LEAST-deficient band (refutes class-wide far deficit)
guilty.primaryDeficitCause: unmodeled Skill-1 duplicate + Skill-2 stack self-buffs (raw M 1.70 vs buff-corr 1.15, up to +48%) + term +1.65%; landing <1 WORSENS

brid-silent-track.measuredBasis: measured term (+1.63%); PRIMARY M on pre-reg LOW term
brid-silent-track.nearIntraFightVariance: near1 8.52 vs near2 9.41 landed/10 (tracks boss proximity; near is not a unit constant)
brid-silent-track.primaryDeficitCause: sim over-models by 4.9x (unrelated kit bug); landing is negligible against that

dorothy-serendipity.evidenceType: spray reconciles to sim ~32M; per-band landing NOT separable (consolidation core-pierce confound ~65M of 96.8M)
dorothy-serendipity.ratioToTable: spray approx table (near/mid/far/midfar not individually resolvable)
dorothy-serendipity.note: NOT a landing anchor; her gap was the consolidation core-pierce, now modeled (ratio 0.99)

soda-twinkling-bunny.evidenceType: footage counter is TEAM TOTAL, not isolable to Soda; excluded

spreadAcrossUnits_ratioToTable.note: over noir, isabel, guilty, brid-silent-track; term-independent

structureSearch.result: NO datamined-stat structure. far/near ratios non-monotonic vs normAtkMult and reloadFrames; element/class give no split. near variance is boss-proximity/positional (brid within-fight 8.52 vs 9.41), not a unit constant.
structureSearch.onlyCrossUnitSignal: far extra-low for isabel (r0.87) + brid (r0.88), agreeing to 0.1% (far M 0.705 / 0.709); guilty (r0.93) + noir (r0.99) read far near table -> a 2-vs-2 per-unit split, not a class constant

optionA.pros: 1 param, captures guilty flat ~0.91, easy term-rescale
optionA.cons: cannot express band SHAPE (isabel/brid near~table but far -12%)

designSketch.recommendedShape: per-unit flat sgLandingScale (guilty ~0.91) + optional per-unit sgFarScale (~0.88 for isabel/brid). 1-2 params, only measured-significant effects. Far stays per-unit (2-2 split), NOT a lowered class far. Default: unlisted units use class table unchanged.

recommendation.verdict: HOLD - do not encode per-unit landing this pass
reasons: Helps zero measured units today and REGRESSES isabel (1.086->~1.12) and guilty (1.346->~1.45): all measured landing factors are <=1, but noir/dorothy already sit at 0.99 and isabel/guilty are sim-LOW from rider/self-buff/term, so a <1 landing pushes them further off.
Bigger per-unit errors dominate and go first: isabel rider periodic-fire (+2.4M), guilty S1-duplicate+S2-stack self-buffs (up to +48%), brid 4.9x over-model, U18 term (~+1.6%).

U18 coupling: noir/dorothy calibrated at LOW term; isabel/guilty/brid confirm true term ~+1.6% higher. If term is raised, class table (and any per-unit scalar) must drop ~1.6%. Record landing as ratio-to-table (term-independent); express the one durable candidate (far ~0.66 for isabel/brid) as sgFarScale ~0.88.
recommendation.sequence: (1) fix isabel rider + guilty self-buffs + brid over-model; (2) resolve U18 term, rescale class table ~-1.6% to keep noir at 0.99 (near0.886/mid0.984/far0.738/midfar0.886); (3) then per-unit landing trim on the corrected term (at most guilty flat scalar + isabel/brid far scalar).
